audience: students, media brands, film startups, mobile developers
title: CineVerse (StreamHub)
summary: A flagship dark-themed Flutter movie and anime streaming application featuring Google Drive video integration, offline downloading, gesture controls, and a robust admin dashboard.
overview: CineVerse is a production-grade streaming hub built with Flutter and Firebase. It features high-speed Google Drive video streaming integration, offline downloading with progress trackers, gesture-based volume/brightness players, next-episode autoplay countdowns, and a massive admin panel dashboard controlling maintenance states, notice banners, and app updates.
longDescription: CineVerse is a highly-polished multiplatform media streaming solution designed with an immersive dark-themed glassmorphism interface. Engineered using Flutter, Provider state management, and Firebase, the application supports two robust layers: a high-engagement client streaming dashboard and a comprehensive admin management console. Clients can stream high-res videos hosted on Google Drive with advanced aspect ratio scaling and custom progress bar styles, while downloading episodes for offline viewing. Admins can moderate comments, push notice overlays, review reported issues, track user stats, and toggling global maintenance controls. This is the ultimate showcase project for mobile media product pitches and engineering presentations.
features: Google Drive Streamer: High-performance streaming container supporting Google Drive hosted MP4 links with automatic fallback modes
Offline Video Downloader: Background download manager saving video files locally with dynamic progress index bars
Advanced Gesture Player: Native-like gesture controls mapping in-player swipe actions for volume, brightness, and fast-forward seek
Next-Episode Autoplay: Configurable next-episode autoplay countdown timer (50-99%) overlaying player displays
Custom Progress Bars: Four select progress indicator designs (Classic, Modern, Minimal, Fancy) styled dynamically
Video Scaling Ratios: Multiple aspect ratios and zoom controls (Fit, Fill, Stretch, 16:9, 4:3, Original) managed in-player
Maintenance Mode Switcher: Admin-controlled server flag displaying custom maintenance blocks instantly to all clients
Notice Broadcast System: Administration board publishing custom updates, notices, and banners dynamically in-app
Community Chat Feed: Discussion post and comment sections letting users share and review anime episodes
Dynamic App Updater: Version comparison wrapper alerting users to update instantly when new releases are pushed
deliverables: Flutter streaming app source code (Android, iOS, Web, Windows)
Admin dashboard panels and analytics views
Deployment and Firebase setup guide documentation
